passCondition: Participant sees purpose, data, access, retention, withdrawal, and support.
publicBoundary: Do not publish names or signatures.

passCondition: The correct authority owner has approved the pathway.
Only approved minimum fields are collected.
Control, access, retention, export, and delete terms are approved.
Official member records, education records, payments, and club records stay external.
Participant can pause or withdraw without penalty.
Participant can request support, complaint handling, and incident escalation.
Participant understands role-based access and revocation.
Meeting notes, attendance, evaluations, and recordings follow approved rules.
Public quotes, names, photos, or stories need separate approval.
Public demo and rehearsal use fake data only.
Participant can request correction and deletion routes.
Proxy/guardian rules, if any, are approved privately.
Consent state is closed, retained, deleted, or archived under approved rule.
